data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Ensures user data and communication are encrypted to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an additional layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates support for mobile authentication apps.

data.title: Secure Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)
data.description: Integrates security practices into the development process.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes static and dynamic analysis tools.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Prepared strategy for identifying and mitigating security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Includes automated monitoring and alert systems.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular scans and patching of known system vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Uses tools like Nessus for vulnerability scanning.
